metadata_details.purpose: Parser for generic logs migrated from samples-main
metadata_details.dependency_summary: Requires ingestion of generic logs in appropriate format
metadata_details.author: Joel Mora

analysis.semantic_summary: Parser designed to process Rubrik backup system logs, capturing timestamp, host information, process details, and service data. Specifically handles structured logging from Rubrik's backup operations with standardized timestamp formats and key-value pair messages.

factors: Regular expression patterns for timestamp and alphanumeric values

optimization_opportunities: Implement error handling for malformed logs
Add support for multiple timestamp formats
analysis.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: rubrik_backup_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: System Activity (1001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T11:12:05.696837

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local timestamp_pattern = "^%d%d%d%d%-%d%d%-%d%dT%d%d:%d%d:%d%d%.%d%d%dZ$"

-- Cached references for performance
local type, pairs, os_time = type, pairs, os.time
local string_match = string.match
local table_insert = table.insert

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with local references
    local output = {
        -- Required OCSF fields
        class_uid = 1001,
        class_name = "System Activity", 
        category_uid = 1,
        category_name = "System",
        activity_id = 1,
        type_uid = 100101,
        
        -- Initialize nested tables
        host = {},
        process = {},
        service = {}
    }

    -- Timestamp handling with validation
    if record.timestamp then
        if string_match(record.timestamp, timestamp_pattern) then
            output.time = record.timestamp
        else
            -- Invalid timestamp format - use current time
            output.time = os_time() * 1000
        end
    else
        output.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    -- Optimized field mappings using local references
    if record.host and record.host.name then
        output.host.name = record.host.name
    end

    if record.process then
        output.process.name = record.process
    end

    if record.service and record.service.name then
        output.service.name = record.service.name
    end

    -- Additional metadata
    output.metadata = {
        product = {
            name = "Rubrik Backup",
            vendor = "Rubrik"
        },
        version = "1.0"
    }

    -- Validation of required fields
    local validation_errors = {}
    if not output.host.name then
        table_insert(validation_errors, "Missing host.name")
    end
    if not output.process.name then
        table_insert(validation_errors, "Missing process.name")
    end
    if not output.service.name then
        table_insert(validation_errors, "Missing service.name") 
    end

    -- Return validation errors if found
    if #validation_errors > 0 then
        return nil, table.concat(validation_errors, ", ")
    end

    return output
end

-- Error wrapper for production use
function safe_transform(record)
    local success, result = pcall(transform, record)
    if not success then
        return nil, "Transform error: " .. tostring(result)
    end
    return result
end

test_cases.name: Valid Complete Record
test_cases.expected: Valid OCSF output with all fields
